advancedSettingsDesc: These settings control the protection rules injected into the Cursor and Codex/Claude runtime kernels. They are enabled by default.
advancedSettingsRedeployNotice: All changes here require redeploying the corresponding application before they take effect.
advancedFileNameGuardDesc: Skip translation when the full text is a file name, path, or resource name with line numbers.
advancedProtectedTermGuard: Protect File Names and Programming Terms in Sentences
advancedProtectedTermGuardDesc: Protect file names, paths, model names, and programming terms with placeholders before translation, then restore them afterward.
advancedBuiltInProtectionDesc: These two tables are injected into the runtime kernel during deployment and can be edited like skip rules.
advancedRuleConfigDesc: These two tables are injected into the runtime kernel during deployment and can be edited like skip rules.
advancedFixedTermsDesc: Add, remove, or paste multiple fixed terms like skip rules; commas and new lines split items automatically.
advancedFixedTermsPlaceholder: Type a term and press Enter...
advancedRegexTermsDesc: Edit model-name and term protection regex rules directly. Each rule is shown on its own full-width line.
advancedRegexSyntaxHint: Supported syntax: plain regex source (the g flag is added automatically), or /pattern/flags. Each rule is shown on its own line; press Enter to add, and pasted multi-line text is split automatically.
advancedCustomRegexDesc: You can write custom regex rules, one per line. Plain regex sources and /pattern/flags syntax are both supported; save and redeploy to apply.
dictGenNoApiKey: Please configure API Key in "AI Key Manager" first.
dictStatusBuiltinNote: Claude uses built-in dictionary files that are auto-injected during deployment.
dictStatusNeedGenerate: Dictionary must be generated before deployment
dictStatusNotExistsBuiltin: Not found (built-in dict will be used)
enableThirdPartyInferenceModeDesc: Add the current translation API domain to Claude CSP for local/third-party inference mode. Claude deployment only.
engineWarningNoEngines:
You have selected "No Engine" mode. Only static dictionary translations will be available after deployment; text not in the dictionary will not be translated.

After configuring an AI API key, the app can translate on the fly, dramatically improving coverage and quality.
engineWarningNoneWithEngines:
You selected "No Engine" mode, but you already have API keys configured for {{names}}.

Switch to a configured engine to enable live translation for text not covered by the dictionary.
engineWarningUnconfigured:
You selected the "{{name}}" engine, but haven't configured its API key yet.

Go to the API key settings to add your key, or switch to an already configured engine. With an AI key, text outside the dictionary can be translated in real time.
extensionScannerFooterNote: Only plugins with internal Webview JS components are shown here. Injection is applied during deployment.
resetCacheDesc: Clear AI translation cache on first launch after deploy, then accumulate normally
skipRulesCheckPluginsHint: Select plugins above to see individual rule items here.
skipRulesPastePlaceholder: Paste or type selectors, press Enter...
skipRulesSkipCssDesc: CSS selectors to skip (elements not to translate)
sudoDesc:
Writing to application resources requires administrator privileges.
Please enter your password when prompted.
updateError: Update failed, please try again later
updateReadyMacOS: Update downloaded, install the new version
